message: Operation 'confirmTransaction' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is empty. Added critical information about state transitions, side effects (payment processing initiation), what triggers this operation, and the response format to enable AI agents to understand the consequences of calling this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Confirms a pending transaction by its internal transaction ID, transitioning it to confirmed status. This operation triggers fund processing and initiates the cross-border payment flow. Returns the updated Transaction object with confirmed status. Side effects include state change from pending to confirmed and initiation of payment processing.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is empty. Added critical information about state transitions, side effects (payment processing initiation), what triggers this operation, and the response format to enable AI agents to understand the consequences of calling this operation.
